description_long: This object is a compact bottle with a rounded rectangular body and a short, narrow neck, sealed with a cork stopper. The main body of the bottle is a muted gray color, with a slightly textured, matte finish that suggests it is made of glass or plastic. The cork at the top is a natural brown, contrasting with the bottle's body and fitting snugly into the neck. The bottle has no visible labels, logos, or decorative elements, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. Its size and shape are typical of small bottled water containers often found in urban environments, such as on sidewalks, in parks, or near vending machines. The overall design is simple, functional, and easy to handle or carry.
description: A small, gray bottle with a cork stopper and a minimalist, label-free design. The bottle has a matte, slightly textured surface and a compact, rounded rectangular shape.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's rounded rectangular body and the cork stopper clearly, with no visible labels or markings.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, maintaining the same proportions and features, with the cork stopper still prominent.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same smooth, label-free surface and the cork stopper visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again similar to the front and side, with the bottle's shape and cork closure unchanged.
attribute_cap_type: Cork stopper; short, cylindrical, natural brown color, fits snugly into the neck.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the bottle material does not allow visibility of the contents inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short and narrow neck with a slight outward flare at the top; no visible threads or ridges, designed to accommodate a cork stopper.
